items.name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Small Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Bag Featuring a unique geometric line outline for a rectangular shape. Soft lightweight Nappa leather adds a casual lazy style. Shoulder, crossbody or handbag carry
items.name_cn:
LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Small Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Bag Featuring a unique geometric line outline for a rectangular shape. Soft lightweight Nappa leather adds a casual lazy style. Shoulder, crossbody or handbag carry
Detachable adjustable strap with rotating buckle*Zip closure, hinged zipper pull One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Detachable LOE**WE gold or silver foil label, featuring hidden pocket and balloon dice*Rectangular metal feet Nappa leather lining Anagram embossing, LOE**WE engraved on the internal plaque.
size:062502
model:24*10.5*16.5cm
F:850(Full set)

specs.rawTitle:
LO℮w℮🌟New Arrival Small Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Bag Featuring a unique geometric line outline for a rectangular shape. Soft lightweight Nappa leather adds a casual lazy style. Shoulder, crossbody or handbag carry
Detachable adjustable strap with rotating buckle*Zip closure, hinged zipper pull One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Detachable LOE**WE gold or silver foil label, featuring hidden pocket and balloon dice*Rectangular metal feet Nappa leather lining Anagram embossing, LOE**WE engraved on the internal plaque.
size:062502
model:24*10.5*16.5cm
F:850(Full set)

items.name_cn:
Madrid【Medium】Bag
- Architecture as Poetry
A tribute to the eternal beauty of Madrid❤️
Medium Size: 28.5-11-23cm
Named after Madrid, the brand's birthplace, the Madrid bag draws inspiration from the city's architectural aesthetics and humanistic character.
- Crafted from the brand's exclusive smooth 🐂 calfskin
With a delicate touch, the lining features soft Nappa leather. The iconic gold Pebble magnetic snap and enlarged zipper design add both practicality and interesting details, while the bottom Pebble metal studs protect the base and enhance stability.
Designer Jonathan Anderson drew inspiration from the fluid lines of the Madrid Temple arches,
incorporating a trapezoidal silhouette and relaxed pleating into the bag body, echoing the city's geometric beauty while imparting a casual, modern feel.

items.name_cn:
Madrid [Small] Handbag
- Poetry in Architecture
A tribute to the eternal beauty of Madrid ❤️
Small size: 23.5-10-19cm
Named after Madrid, the brand's birthplace, the Madrid handbag draws inspiration from the city's architectural aesthetics and cultural temperament.
- Crafted with brand-exclusive calfskin
Featuring a delicate touch, the lining is made of soft Nappa leather. The iconic gold Pebble magnetic snap and enlarged zipper design add both practicality and interesting details, while the bottom Pebble metal studs protect the base and enhance stability.
Designer Jonathan Anderson drew inspiration from the fluid lines of the Madrid Temple arches,
incorporating a trapezoidal silhouette and loose pleats into the bag body, echoing the geometric beauty of the cityscape while imparting a casual, relaxed modern feel.

items.name_cn:
Model 30012
The new favorite LOEWE Puzzle features a gradient color scheme that looks like sunset hues woven into the bag body
The woven handle is exquisite and unique, giving a relaxed vibe when carried casually
The 3D geometric shape is super spacious, perfect for daily outings or short trips 🎒
Just stuff everything in and go
Wear it on the street and turn heads instantly
Finally understand why fashionistas love LOEWE
Practical and stylish, whoever wears it becomes a walking fashion recommendation 🌿
- 24cm
